title: Ringeltaube Vethamonikam Memorial Church, Mylaudy
tagline: Ringeltaube Vethamonikam Memorial Church, Mylaudy — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

heroImage.alt: Ringeltaube Vethamonikam Memorial Church, Mylaudy, Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Ringeltaube Vethamonikam Memorial Church, (Tamil: றிங்கல் தௌபே வேதமாணிக்கம் நினைவு தலைமை தேவாலயம், மயிலாடி) is a church located in Mylaudy, in the Kanyakumari district of Tamil Nad
overview.description: Ringeltaube Vethamonikam Memorial Church, (Tamil: றிங்கல் தௌபே வேதமாணிக்கம் நினைவு தலைமை தேவாலயம், மயிலாடி) is a church located in Mylaudy, in the Kanyakumari district of Tamil Nadu, India. It is one of the oldest and largest churches in the region and serves as the cathedral of the Kanyakumari Diocese of the Church of South India (CSI). The church has a history of over 200 years. On 1 May 1996, the church was designated as a District Church.

topPlaces.name: Myladi, Tamil Nadu
topPlaces.description: Myladi is one of the town panchayats in Kanniyakumari district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is a town rich in fields, mountains, rivers and natural resources.

topPlaces.name: Kulasekharapuram
topPlaces.description: Kulasekharapuram is a village in Kollam district in the state of Kerala, India. It is the largest Grama Panchayath in Karunagappally Legislative Assembly Constituency.Places like Puthiyakavu, Vallickavu, Vavvakkavu, Puthentheruvu are some major places within Kulasekharapuram Village.

topPlaces.name: Kulasekarapuram
topPlaces.description: Kulasekarapuram is a village is near to the Osaravillai in Kanniyakumari district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Marunthuvazh Malai
topPlaces.description: The Marundhuvazh Malai, a part of Sanjeevi hills is also known as the Marundhu Vazhum Malai/Maruthwamalai ("the abode of medicinal herbs"), forms the part and the southernmost tip of the Western Ghats in Agasteeswaram taluk of Kanyakumari district of Tamil Nadu, India. People living in southern Kerala call it "Maruthuva Mala".

topPlaces.name: Marungoor
topPlaces.description: Marungoor, also spelt Marungur, is a panchayat town near Suchindrum in Kanniyakumari district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The place has an area of about 10 km2.

topPlaces.name: Rajavoor
topPlaces.description: Rajavoor is a village located in Agastheeswaram Taluk of Kanniyakumari District of Tamil Nadu. Previously Rajavoor was called as Vanchimarthandanalloor in some land registration documents during the reign of Travancore Princely State ruled by Maharajas (refer Nagam Ayya's 'State Manual of Travancore').

topPlaces.name: Swamithope Pathi
topPlaces.description: Swamithoppu Pathi (Tamil: சுவாமிதோப்பு பதி, Swamithoppu-pathi, Manavai-pathi, Detchana-pathi, or Thamarai-pathi) is the primary pathi of the Ayyavazhi and the sacred venue of the Tavam. Swamithope is considered primary among the Pancha pathi and the primary centre of the incarnational activities of Vaikundar.

topPlaces.name: Atchenkulam
topPlaces.description: Atchenkulam is a village in Kanyakumari District, Tamil Nadu. The village is 1 km from Kottaram, part of Kottaram town Panchayat and comes under Agastheeswaram taluk.

items.note: Myladi is one of the town panchayats in Kanniyakumari district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is a town rich in fields, mountains, rivers and natural resources.

Kulasekharapuram is a village in Kollam district in the state of Kerala, India. It is the largest Grama Panchayath in Karunagappally Legislative Assembly Constituency.Places like Puthiyakavu, Vallickavu, Vavvakkavu, Puthentheruvu are some major places within Kulasekharapuram Village.
Kulasekarapuram is a village is near to the Osaravillai in Kanniyakumari district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

The Marundhuvazh Malai, a part of Sanjeevi hills is also known as the Marundhu Vazhum Malai/Maruthwamalai ("the abode of medicinal herbs"), forms the part and the southernmost tip of the Western Ghats in Agasteeswaram taluk of Kanyakumari district of Tamil Nadu, India. People living in southern Kerala call it "Maruthuva Mala".
Marungoor, also spelt Marungur, is a panchayat town near Suchindrum in Kanniyakumari district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The place has an area of about 10 km2.

Rajavoor is a village located in Agastheeswaram Taluk of Kanniyakumari District of Tamil Nadu. Previously Rajavoor was called as Vanchimarthandanalloor in some land registration documents during the reign of Travancore Princely State ruled by Maharajas (refer Nagam Ayya's 'State Manual of Travancore').

Swamithoppu Pathi (Tamil: சுவாமிதோப்பு பதி, Swamithoppu-pathi, Manavai-pathi, Detchana-pathi, or Thamarai-pathi) is the primary pathi of the Ayyavazhi and the sacred venue of the Tavam. Swamithope is considered primary among the Pancha pathi and the primary centre of the incarnational activities of Vaikundar.
Atchenkulam is a village in Kanyakumari District, Tamil Nadu. The village is 1 km from Kottaram, part of Kottaram town Panchayat and comes under Agastheeswaram taluk.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Ringeltaube Vethamonikam Memorial Church, Mylaudy?
faq.a: The best time to visit Ringeltaube Vethamonikam Memorial Church, Mylaudy is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Ringeltaube Vethamonikam Memorial Church, Mylaudy?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (74 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (71 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Ringeltaube Vethamonikam Memorial Church, Mylaudy?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Ringeltaube Vethamonikam Memorial Church, Mylaudy at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Ringeltaube Vethamonikam Memorial Church, Mylaudy?
faq.a: Stays in Ringeltaube Vethamonikam Memorial Church, Mylaudy start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Ringeltaube Vethamonikam Memorial Church, Mylaudy?
faq.a: The top attractions are Myladi, Tamil Nadu, Kulasekharapuram, Kulasekarapuram, Marunthuvazh Malai, Marungoor.
